title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.265 - Assessment not illegal because of informality in making
text:
137.265.  Assessment not illegal because of informality in making. — An assessment of property or charges for taxes thereon shall not be considered illegal on account of any informality in making the assessment, or in the tax lists, or on account of the assessment not being made or completed within the time required by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 10980, A.L. 1945 p. 1782 § 21) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9791; 1919 § 12801; 1909 § 11383
